blurb: Canvas-driven background and data-viz pieces — the rotating match globe, the resonance exchange emitter, the hero perspective lattice, and the scrolling ticker.

components.name: Match globe
components.blurb: Rotating wireframe globe of creator nodes with budget-clearing arcs and a live azimuth HUD, drawn on a canvas.
components.html:
